rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE MARITAL TRUST DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Exhibits To The Declaration Of Jordan Rose
rulings.Rulings: Bruce Qvale and Laura Hiura's (Respondents) Motion to Seal is DENIED. With regard to the attorney-client privilege category of documents, under Evid. Code Sections 957, 960, 961, these documents are not subject to the privilege and thus do not warrant sealing. With regard to the "confidential financial information" category of documents, Respondents have not shown that sealing is the least restrictive means available. The account information can be redacted; the entirety of the exhibits need not be sealed to achieve Respondents' interest in preventing fraud. Jeff Qvale's petition to remove or suspend trustees is denied without prejudice. The current factual record does not justify suspending the trustees without an evidentiary hearing. The prevailing parties are to submit proposed orders. Those who wish to contest the tentative rulings should inform court and counsel no later than 3:00 p.m. today (8/26/2014).
